sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['children']:
        print(f"Character: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    elif n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"P-shape: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    elif n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"Y-shape: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check ascii around character area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCharacter area (rows 14-24, cols 30-45):")
for i in range(14, 25):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][30:46]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
